raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 868 aims to equitably distribute excess funds within the California State Teachers' Retirement System's Supplemental Benefit Maintenance Account.",
    "The California State Teachers' Retirement System's Supplemental Benefit Maintenance Account holds a projected excess of $11.9 billion.",
    "Teachers in the CalSTRS system who retired before 1999 receive comparatively less benefits than their peers who retired in the early 2000s or after.",
    "Retired teachers who retired before 1999 are disproportionately impacted by inflation erosion, increased health care expenses, and other financial hardships.",
    "SB 868 will provide an additional layer of protection for California's oldest retired teachers to maintain their economic independence.",
    "The bill creates a one-time permanent adjustment in retirement benefits for educators who retired before 1999."
  ]
}
```
